meaning: n.打击,震动,冲突,休克,突击,禾束堆,乱蓬的头发vt.使震动,使休克,使受电击,震惊得vi.震动,吓人adj.蓬乱的,浓密的
examples: The bumper absorbs shock on impact.
The shock caused her to miscarry.
Pinnacle's managing director Graham Reed said this development was "a complete surprise and shock to us".
But what about protecting your business from the shock of losing one of its heroes?
